summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-floor Vastu blueprint generator. Backend APIs working perfectly with 100% success rate. Frontend multi-floor functionality working excellently with floor selector, floor switching, room filtering, and staircase ghost indicators. Found critical backward compatibility issues with single floor projects.

ui_bugs.issue: Floor selector panel appears for single floor projects when it should be hidden
ui_bugs.expected_behavior: Floor selector should only appear when num_floors > 1

ui_bugs.issue: Canvas title shows 'Floor 2' for single floor project instead of just '2D Floor Plan'
ui_bugs.expected_behavior: Single floor projects should not show floor number in title

ui_bugs.issue: Room selection clicks intercepted by electrical layer SVG overlay when electrical layer is active
ui_bugs.workaround: Toggle off electrical layer before selecting rooms

integration_issues.issue: Plumbing elements count shows 0 on all floors when layers are enabled
integration_issues.note: May be related to SVG data-layer attribute detection

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints (22/22 passed) - 100% success rate
Multi-floor project generation: 3-floor project with 28 rooms, unique layouts per floor
Floor field validation: All rooms, plumbing (23), and electrical (78) elements have floor field
Staircase distribution: Staircases found on all floors (1, 2, 3) at same position
Floor selector panel: Appears correctly for multi-floor projects with 3 floor buttons
Floor selector mini-previews: Shows room counts and Vastu scores per floor
Floor switching: Canvas title updates correctly (Floor 1, Floor 2, Floor 3)
Room filtering by floor: Different floors show different room counts (8, 8, 5 rooms)
Staircase ghost indicators: 2 dashed blue indicators from other floors visible
Layer toggles: ARCH/PLMB/ELEC buttons working correctly
Multi-floor AI generation: Claude Sonnet 4.5 generates unique layouts per floor
Project management: Multi-floor project creation and loading
Vastu scoring: Room-level scores calculated correctly for each floor
AI Copilot: Chat interface working with multi-floor projects
Cost estimation: Tab navigation and calculations working
Export functionality: PDF, DXF, and Print A3 options available
User interface: Professional design with proper multi-floor navigation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical backward compatibility issues: (1) Hide floor selector for single floor projects (num_floors <= 1), (2) Remove floor number from canvas title for single floor projects, (3) Fix room selection overlay issue with electrical layer
